case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ZOLZAYA KHUCHITBAATAR JR

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KHUCHITBAATAR JR, ZOLZAYA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-31-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-26-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) AS TO DEFENDANT KHUCHITBAATAR JR, ZOLZAYA
STATEMENT OF EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KHUCHITBAATAR JR, ZOLZAYA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) FILED BY ATTORNEY LAYMAN, PATRICK J
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100023779) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED SEP-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KHUCHITBAATAR JR, ZOLZAYA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-26-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHUCHITBAATAR JR, ZOLZAYA $1,731.11 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100029471)
